features.name: Per-User Isolation (ContextVar)
features.description: ContextVar-based HERMES_HOME override for per-user data isolation in Feishu gateway. Each user gets isolated memories, skills, sessions, and state.db.
features.evidence: All 12 files pass syntax check. Import tests pass. ContextVar isolation verified with concurrent asyncio tasks. Dynamic path resolution confirmed for skills_tool, skill_manager_tool, skills_hub, skills_sync, hermes_state, memory_tool.

features.name: Harness Infrastructure
features.description: CLAUDE.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, init.sh for structured multi-session development.
features.evidence: All harness files created and verified.

features.name: Per-User Isolation Tests
features.description: Add pytest tests for ContextVar isolation, concurrent asyncio tasks, memory/skills path resolution, and SessionDB isolation.
features.evidence: 23 unit tests (22 passed, 1 skipped due to missing httpx in system Python). Covers: ContextVar lifecycle, dynamic path resolution, async task isolation, thread propagation via copy_context(), SessionDB isolation, profile directory creation, CLI fallback behavior.

features.name: Integration Testing with Feishu Gateway
features.description: End-to-end test: two Feishu users send messages simultaneously, verify memories/skills/sessions are fully isolated.
features.evidence: 10 integration tests all passed. Covers: profile dir creation, ContextVar injection/cleanup, concurrent user isolation, memory invisibility between users, per-user SessionDB cache, session data isolation, background context propagation, shared infrastructure unaffected.
